The Orion Health Population Health API provides programmatic access to population health management capabilities including patient registries, risk stratification, care coordination, cohort analytics, and health outcome tracking. It enables healthcare organizations to identify at-risk populations, manage care programs, and track quality measures across patient cohorts.

Contact Support:
 Name: Orion Health API Support
